report.summary: UX audit of 3 recently modified components (DeFAIProtocolExplorer, EcosystemStore, CoursesHub), implemented mobile responsiveness and accessibility fixes, created 3 OG images for pages missing social sharing cards.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Converted 4-column rigid grid controls to responsive flex-wrap layout that stacks gracefully on mobile
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added aria-label to search input, category filter, chain filter, and sort select elements
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added focus-visible outlines (#6366f1) to all form controls for keyboard navigation
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Added role=button, tabIndex, aria-expanded, aria-label, and keyboard handler (Enter/Space) to expandable protocol cards
DeFAIProtocolExplorer: Collapsed TVL + Market Cap + chevron into a flex row, hiding TVL on small screens to prevent overflow
CoursesHub: Added role=tablist and role=tab with aria-selected to course filter pills (replacing aria-pressed)
CoursesHub: Changed stats row from flex to flex-wrap with min-widths so cards wrap properly on narrow screens
CoursesHub: Added flex-wrap with gap-y to hero stats line to prevent horizontal overflow on mobile

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-referral.svg (1200x630) — referral chain illustration with connected user icons and +500 XP badges, feature pills for invite rewards
OG image: og-notifications.svg (1200x630) — stacked notification cards showing price alerts, whale moves, airdrops, and course updates
OG image: og-xp-attestation.svg (1200x630) — on-chain badge illustration with EAS verification, shield icon, and orbiting checkmarks

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Logged for Future Sprints)
items: 1 page still missing OG image (share page) — low priority as it's a utility page
DeFAIProtocolExplorer uses inline styles throughout — consider migrating to Tailwind for consistency with rest of codebase
EcosystemStore horizontal scroll sections still lack visible scroll affordance indicators (scroll arrows or peek animation)
Color-only indicators for risk levels (green/yellow/red) in DeFAIProtocolExplorer already have text labels — accessible
CoursesHub localStorage usage needs try/catch around JSON.parse (already has it) — solid implementation
